emails.subject: Re: Fresno Cogeneration
emails.body: Re: Fresno Cogeneration The contact for Fresno Cogen is Ken Salvagno phone number is 916-447-5171. Thanks, Kate Rhonda L Denton 04/30/2001 03:05 PM

emails.body: Fresno Cogeneration New CP under 595518 is being set up tomorrow. Can you please provide me with a phone number so GCP can confirm their information? Please copy Bernice also.
